review: I stopped by Pho Street for a comforting bowl of noodles and was not disappointed. The casual atmosphere and free WiFi made it a great spot to catch up on some work while I enjoyed my meal. The food was delicious, and I appreciated that they had take-out and delivery available. However, I did notice that they didn't have outdoor seating, which would have been a nice touch. Overall, I'd definitely recommend Pho Street for a tasty and convenient meal.
